title: Refactor: Simplify state management with Redux pattern
original_text: Refactored the state management to use a Redux-like pattern instead of scattered state variables. Created a centralized store in state/store.js with actions and reducers. This makes state changes predictable and easier to debug. Updated all components to dispatch actions instead of mutating state directly. Added middleware for logging and persistence. Result: 52 tests pass.
expected_body_lines: - Implement actions and reducers for state changes
- Add middleware for logging and persistence
expected_command: git commit -m "refactor(state): simplify with Redux-like pattern"
